title: VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE - 211info
text: VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE VALLEY FAMILY HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include primary care, care of acute and chronic conditions, prenatal care/delivery, family planning, and immunizations. Also offers mental health evaluations and counseling for youth and adults in an individual, family, or group setting, and psychiatric medicine services. 1441 NE 10th Avenue Payette, ID 83661 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6:30pm Email (208) 642-9376 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (208) 642-9376 Reception Reception (208) 642-9376 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts Medicaid, private insurance, and payments; offers sliding scale fees DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Malheur County Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Birth Control Counseling Childhood Immunization Delivery/Childbirth Family and Community Medicine Family Counseling General Medical Care Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Prenatal Care Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
